sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ فِي شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Juče sam išao na razgovor za posao u jednu veliku firmu.
sentences.translationEn: I went to a job interview at a big company yesterday.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي الْمُدِيرُ عَنْ خِبْرَتِي السَّابِقَةِ فِي مَجَالِ التَّسْوِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor me je pitao o mom prethodnom iskustvu u oblasti marketinga.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked me about my previous experience in the field of marketing.

sentences.arabic: أَجَبْتُ عَنْ جَمِيعِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَابْتِسَامَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio sam na sva pitanja sa samopouzdanjem i osmijehom.
sentences.translationEn: I answered all the questions with confidence and a smile.

sentences.arabic: أَتَمَنَّى الْحُصُولَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ لِأَنَّهَا فُرْصَةٌ رَائِعَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Nadam se da ću dobiti ovaj posao jer je to izvrsna prilika.
sentences.translationEn: I hope to get this job because it is a great opportunity.
